steps.t: The Ranger is encamped at Sûri-kylä. Now that you have found the book of heraldry as directed by Arvedui, you should take it to the Ranger the ancient…
Arevedui is in the wreckage of the Elf-ship, north along the Ice-bay in Talvi-mûri. Having delivered the book, you should return to Arvedui for furthe…
